annual_rate.notes: New Jersey tort prejudgment interest is calculated 'in the same amount and manner' as post-judgment interest (R. 4:42-11(b)): for 2026, 4.5% on amounts up to the Special Civil Part limit ($20,000) and 6.5% (base + 2%) above it. Simple interest. Verify the current Notice to the Bar at njcourts.gov. Not legal advice.
